name: bridge
description: Bridge — global task manager for Claude Code. Dependency-aware DAG, persists across repos/sessions.

skills.name: task-workflow
skills.description: Use when managing tasks, tracking work, planning implementations, or organizing work with dependencies. Replaces bd and TodoWrite for task management.

commands.name: next
commands.description: Pick up the next ready task

commands.name: plan-tasks
commands.description: Break down a plan into tracked tasks with dependencies
